title: Growth Gateway: Opportunities for UK fintech players in Morocco
body: "This slide deck was prepared by the Growth Gateway programme team in collaboration with the Boston Consulting Group. It aims to support stakeholders in understanding Morocco’s growing fintech ecosystem presents significant opportunities for UK investors and firms, supported by strong digital infrastructure, regulatory reform, and bilateral collaboration.  The document provides insights into Morocco’s fintech sector, which shows potential but lags in start-up activity, funding, and digital payment adoption. It outlines the strategic potential for UK fintech companies in Morocco, to promote trade and investment between the UK and Morocco by showcasing the Moroccan fintech ecosystem and identifying strategic opportunities for UK fintech companies.  The document highlights Morocco’s emerging fintech landscape, outlines regulatory and market entry pathways, and presents 4 main opportunity types for UK investors and businesses: investment, corporate partnerships, market entry, and expertise sharing.   Find out more about Growth Gateway.  "
